name: Comprehensive analyst + gap suite (2026-05-30)
description: ~261-case comprehensive suite built by an orchestrated joint team of data-analyst + AI engineers. Sections A-H (181 cases) target the gaps identified in the 2026-05-30 assessment: 0-question lookups (ComplaintTypes, ResolutionTypes), under-tested long-tail tables, cross-domain joins (aging, SLA breach, outage reach, subsidy behavior, technician workload, call→ticket conversion), MoM/YoY time-window comparisons, recursive CTE rollups (Region/Department/Asset trees), window-function depth, refuse/OOS path, and Arabic translations. Section I (80 cases) is the data-analyst comprehensive layer: simple counts and averages a real analyst asks every day, per-user/per-customer breakdowns, tickets-with-full-context (creator + assignee + resolver + department + entities), period-over-period diffs, and top/bottom-N per dimension. Runs ALONGSIDE baseline-finetune-prep-2026-05-29.json. Schema matches the baseline file so the Copilot Assessment page can load it as a checkbox section.

statistics.bySection: A-Lookups=12 B-LongTail=72 C-CrossDomain=33 D-Time=14 E-CTE=6 F-WIN=6 G-Refuse=8 H-Arabic=30 I-AnalystComprehensive=80 J-TemporalCompleteness=33

schemaNote: Each entry: Code (unique), Question, Shape, Difficulty (easy|medium|hard|multi-part|safety|refusal), Locale (en|ar), ExpectedColumns (bare names, scorer uses alias map), ExpectedRowCountDirection (single|many|zero|>0), ExpectedRowCount (data-backed number when known), EntityFocus, MaxLatencyMs (180000 = 3 min).
